recommendations.title: Cinderella Man
recommendations.overview: The true story of boxer Jim Braddock who, following his retirement in the 1930s, makes a surprise comeback in order to lift his family out of poverty.

recommendations.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween

recommendations.title: The Sixth Sense
recommendations.overview: Following an unexpected tragedy, child psychologist Malcolm Crowe meets a nine year old boy named Cole Sear, who is hiding a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Mary Kom
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of Indian boxer 'Mary Kom' who went through several hardships before audaciously accomplishing her ultimate dream.

recommendations.title: Mac & Devin Go to High School
recommendations.overview: A comedy that follows two high school students -- one overachiever struggling to write his valedictorian speech, the other a senior now going on his 15th year of school.

recommendations.title: The Last Picture Show

recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: The passionate love between a former boxer and a beautiful blind woman.

recommendations.title: Clay Pigeons

recommendations.title: Ali
recommendations.overview: In 1964, a brash, new pro boxer, fresh from his Olympic gold medal victory, explodes onto the scene: Cassius Clay. Bold and outspoken, he cuts an entirely new image for African Americans in sport with his proud public self-confidence and his unapolog

recommendations.title: The Beach House
recommendations.overview: A romantic getaway for two troubled college sweethearts turns into a struggle for survival when unexpected guests – and the surrounding environment – exhibit signs of a mysterious infection.
